w6_cipher_core.algorithm_summary: Linear bit-shuffle: chain of shl, shr, and 0xFF, and 0xFFFF, xor, add operations on input r, s parameters. Returns 2 bytes via conv.u1 x2.

w7_cipher_harness.algorithm_summary: W7 cipher invocation harness — loads 23 decrypted string parameters via Method[26]:h (Dotfuscator decrypt) with salt 8, then chains calls to helper cipher methods.
w7_cipher_harness.still_unknown: Full algebraic translation of the 6 helper methods to produce a working pure-JS w7 implementation.

ui_event_handlers_not_cipher.note: Methods 1594 and 1595 are also named w7/w6 but are UI button event handlers (ListControl::get_SelectedIndex + String::Concat), NOT cipher code. Easy to confuse by name alone.
